items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
BVLGARI SERPENTI FOREVER
Shoulder bag
Model: 29032
Dimensions: 25-17-8cm
The new "Serpenti Forever" series shoulder bag highlights urban style and fashion versatility, adding a unique trendy touch to the Serpenti world. This bag is crafted from peach-colored calfskin with light gold-plated brass accessories. Black and white agate enamel and green malachite sensual eyes add a bewitching charm to the classic snake head clasp. An adjustable serpentine chain and leather shoulder strap easily match stylish daywear.
Medium size, two storage compartments and a small vanity mirror. An open pocket, a zip pocket, and two external pockets.

items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
Shoulder tote - a lunch bag you can just grab and go. Made with classic intrecciato weaving, embodying Bottega's artisan spirit. The entire body is crafted from top-tier Happa lambskin, very soft, lightweight, and the small shape is cute and exquisite. The interior capacity is also sufficient; it can be carried by hand or under the arm, quite practical! The bottom features a gold metal base to prevent wear. The details are really spot on! The elegant commuter bag for early risers is the one to choose. 3002 Dimensions: 22x13x9.5
